title: astragalus farctus
intro: Astragalus farctus, also known as the woolly milk-vetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Western Asia and Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. Astragalus farctus is believed to have health benefits such as enhancing immune function, reducing stress, and improving cardiovascular health, and is often prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use.
